meta-description: Learn about stand-alone dental plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Stand-alone dental plan
excerpt: A type of dental plan offered through the Marketplace that’s not included as part of a health plan. You may want this if the health coverage you choose doesn’t include dental, or if you want different dental coverage.
content:
A type of dental plan offered through the Marketplace that’s not included as part of a health plan. You may want this if the health coverage you choose doesn’t include dental, or if you want different dental coverage.

  • More on dental coverage in the Marketplace
